name: Feature Detail Modal
description: When clicking a feature row, show a modal/page with rendered spec.md, plan.md, and tasks.md content. Use markdown rendering.

name: New Project Form
description: Add 'New Project' button to landing page that opens a form to enter project name and description.

name: Interview UI
description: Interactive interview questionnaire that walks through the 8 phases, collecting answers. Renders questions dynamically, stores responses.

name: Project Generation
description: After interview, generate app-context.md and features.json, then call specflow init to create the project. Show progress and redirect to new project.
